picks.analysis: SMCI scores +17 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+6), reinforced by Narrative (+6). The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Earnings Surprise (+2, +34.5%), Guidance (+2, +26.0%). Cutting the other way: Analyst Price Target (-1, -20% to $37.13), RSI 14 (-1, 79.8). Within Technology we gave SMCI a +17 and ACN a +16 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take SMCI calls over ACN calls, mainly on Technicals (+2 vs +1). The suggested calls sit ~29.4% OTM with 48d to expiry, delta 0.29, mid $2.57 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.
